title: blemeesd.session_closed
description:
Sent to every active watcher (NOT the closer) when a session ends, immediately before the daemon unhooks the watcher writers. Watchers can use this to flip their UI to a closed state — re-watching afterwards returns `session_unknown`. Owners do not receive this frame: they get the `blemeesd.closed` ack to their own `blemeesd.close` request, and on connection drop they see no notification at all because the session record is detached, not closed.

`reason` is forward-extensible; v0.9 emits only `"owner_closed"` (the explicit `blemeesd.close` path). Future codes (`idle_reaped`, `backend_crashed`, etc.) are reserved for later releases.

reason.description: Why the session ended. Watchers should treat unknown future values as terminal (the session is gone either way).
